query:
-- İlk etabı ata (22-24 yaş grubu için)
INSERT INTO user_stages (userId, stageId, status) 
VALUES (240003, (SELECT id FROM stages WHERE ageGroup = '22-24' ORDER BY stageOrder LIMIT 1), 'active');

-- Kontrol et
SELECT us.id, us.userId, us.stageId, us.status, s.title 
FROM user_stages us 
JOIN stages s ON us.stageId = s.id 
WHERE us.userId = 240003;
